fields.name: background-color
fields.label: Background Color
fields.description: use hex (e.g. #000000), RGB (e.g. rgb(0, 0, 0)) html color names or css tokens

fields.name: background-image
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Background image of the section, displayed on top of the background color if specified

fields.name: background-image-2
fields.label: Background Image (768px+)
fields.description: Art-direction rendition shown at viewports 768px and wider

fields.name: background-image-3
fields.label: Background Image (992px+)
fields.description: Art-direction rendition shown at viewports 992px and wider

fields.name: background-image-4
fields.label: Background Image (1200px+)
fields.description: Art-direction rendition shown at viewports 1200px and wider

fields.name: background-image-5
fields.label: Background Image (1600px+)
fields.description: Art-direction rendition shown at viewports 1600px and wider
